reviews.review_text: Great food and great service from Francisco! We will be back!
Francisco was an awesome waiter! The food was great and it was a true authentic Mexican atmosphere. Definitely going to be going here again 💯🙂
Francisco was a great waiter!!!
Emmanuel is amazing so attentive, helpful, and prompt. The food was amazing

We met David today at Los Tres Amigos, and he made a Mangonada Margarita for us!! This margarita was amazing! The flavors blended really well, and the tajin and chamoy were a great addition to this already flavorful margarita! When you come to Los Tres Amigos, check out David at the bar! He will hook your margarita UP! Thank you, David, for a great experience!

We had Dorieliz as our server and she did an amazing job! She was extremely quick giving our food, and clearing our plates when we were done. I would definitely come back and the food was super tasty!

We met David today at Los Tres Amigos, and he made a Mangonada Margarita for us!! This margarita was amazing! The flavors blended really well, and the tajin and chamoy were a great addition to this already flavorful margarita! When you come to Los Tres Amigos, check out David at the bar! He will hook your margarita UP! Thank you, David, for a great experience!

Today, my family and I came to Los Tres Amigos on Canton Center Rd and had an awesome experience! Not only was the food really good, but the service provided by Dorieliz was superb! She truly catered to our needs and even told us about the new Mangonada Margarita that they had. When I tell this margarita was the BEST I’ve had! I’m a margarita lover, but this was sooooo good. I highly recommend it to anyone who loves margaritas! You won’t be disappointed!
Mangonada margarita my favorite drink it’s a new one it’s good for a hot days
The food and the service was excellent and the mangonada margarita it’s a good drink and the server name pancho was a great person

We had Dorieliz as our server and she did an amazing job! She was extremely quick giving our food, and clearing our plates when we were done. I would definitely come back and the food was super tasty!
Amazing place. Our server Dorieliz she was great.
As always these guys are super!  Can't go wrong here!   Love this place.  You guys are AWESOME!

I highly recommend it to anyone who loves margaritas! You won’t be disappointed!
Love Los Tres! It’s our favorite place! The staff is friendly, the food is great and the margaritas are the best around! Love the patio in the summer time. Thank you

Margaritas!!!!!!!!   Great food, great food. Ask for Fransisco he was awesome.
Wonderful lunch today. Service was good and friendly. Food was delicious.
Wonderful waiting staff, delicious food, affordable prices, authentic selection, wide variety of options. I will definitely be back again and again! 🇲🇽

Our family loves this restaurant. The staff is quick to accommodate seating for a large group. The food is fresh and delicious. Service is quick even for a large order. Great vibes, definitely recommend this restaurant!
As always these guys are super!  Can't go wrong here!   Love this place.  You guys are AWESOME!
Francisco was an awesome waiter! The food was great and it was a true authentic Mexican atmosphere. Definitely going to be going here again 💯🙂

Today, my family and I came to Los Tres Amigos on Canton Center Rd and had an awesome experience! Not only was the food really good, but the service provided by Dorieliz was superb! She truly catered to our needs and even told us about the new Mangonada Margarita that they had. When I tell this margarita was the BEST I’ve had! I’m a margarita lover, but this was sooooo good. I highly recommend it to anyone who loves margaritas! You won’t be disappointed!

This place has the potential to be really good but it's inconsistent. The wife and I went for Taco Tuesday today, and the tacos hardly had any meat.  It felt really skimpy even for $2 each. They used to be generous with their portions. We also had to argue for them to include the green and spicy salsas, which they used to include no problem. Neither of us had a good experience unfortunately.

Absolutely terrible, fiance went with her mother because Mexican Fiesta was closed, she ordered the tacos, they told her the shells were homemade, thats a lie,  they're clearly store bought Ortega Shells, werwnt even fried, and ha dno flavor at all, she ate half of one and didnt touch it agian after, absolutely terrible.
Photo of her meal below
Slow service, fish tacos not well seasoned, cold and dry rice.  Beef tacos all carte were OK.

Ridiculous. I came in last night with a party of 11 at 7PM. Took the server 25 minutes just to take our drink order. Then another 45 minutes just to have our food come out, come to find out they’re out of steak, fries, beans, and quite literally everything we wanted to order. We were not notified that in the beginning either. I understand having a new server, but why put that sever on a party of 11 with 5+ kids? Won’t be coming back to this location ever again. We spent 100+ dollars, and absolutely no apology from our original server.

Years ago I gave this place 5 stars.  Now twice in a row I've been sat and ignored, while tables sat after mine were served.  Asking a passing employee if they could send our server over didn't help either time.  Requests to speak to a manager were met with shrugs.  Find somewhere else for your taco and marg fix.

5/24/2026: 7:00pm.

I was sat at a dirty table. Most of the servers around me were on their phones.  The chips were stail and cold. My waitress only checked on me once or twice.  I could see if The place was packed but it wasn't.Do better

We were not notified that in the beginning either. I understand having a new server, but why put that sever on a party of 11 with 5+ kids? Won’t be coming back to this location ever again. We spent 100+ dollars, and absolutely no apology from our original server.

Waited in line to be seated for over an hour on Cinco De Mayo. The restaurant was basically empty with plenty of tables open. The restaurants management stopped seating IN HOUSE CUSTOMERS to prioritize online orders. Kept telling us 20 minutes and then told
Us an hour and a half. Never have seen such a horribly ran restaurant. Will never come back.

To loud for people with Hearing aids, even the person I was with said it was very loud and he doesn't wear hearing aids. The music was way too loud! I did not think the food was good at all. The chips were stale and the dinner that I got wasn't bad but it's nothing that I would want to run and go back to again. I'll never go there again. It was that bad. And not at all worth the price that we paid.

If you enjoy waiting an extra 30 minute for your food this is your place due to and I quote "we got hella people in here".

Not the first time this has happened, just go somewhere else.

Always a solid meal from here. Francisco was our waiter and was awesome!
Francisco was great. This is the best location! Canton, MI!
Francisco was amazing in the midst of Cinco de Mayo chaos 😊
Food was great, service was aewsome.. would be cool if our waiter didn't vape while in the kitchen which is in clear view of customers. Used his vape with his gloves on as well. Not cool

Came at lunchtime with a party of 12, two tables of 6. Virtually the only ones in the entire restaurant.  1 basket of chips and salsa per table and never once offered to refill. Took a long time to get the food and drinks were not refilled.  Maybe it was because we came the day after Cinco De Mayo and the employee's were hung over? Food was still good, the service could have been better.  Also, I think the bathroom temperature is set at 40° F. 🥶

The chips were stale and the dinner that I got wasn't bad but it's nothing that I would want to run and go back to again. I'll never go there again. It was that bad. And not at all worth the price that we paid.
